intent_tree: {"将MP3文件中的语音转换为文字并分析情感": {"查找桌面上或下载文件夹中的MP3文件": {"检查找到的MP3文件是否清晰可用": {}}, "将MP3文件中的语音转换为文字": {}, "从转换后的文字中提取关键词并进行情感分析": {}, "将转写内容和分析结果结构化保存": {"生成Markdown格式的报告": {"添加层级标题": {}, "保存文件元信息": {}, "保存正文内容": {}, "保存分析结果": {}}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "搜索桌面和下载文件夹中的所有MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "验证找到的MP3文件的质量（时长、采样率等）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "将MP3文件转换为WAV格式以供处理"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "使用Google Speech Recognition API将音频转录为文本"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "对生成的文本进行中文分词"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "使用TF-IDF算法提取关键词"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "使用SnowNLP进行情感分析"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "清理临时文件（如WAV文件）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "获取音频文件的元信息（路径、大小、时长、采样率）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "生成带时间戳的Markdown报告文件"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "在报告中添加层级标题"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "在报告中保存文件元信息"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "在报告中保存正文内容"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "在报告中保存分析结果"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "保存报告到指定目录"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileFound"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "qualityChecked"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "convertedToWav"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "transcribedText"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "segmentedText"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "keywordsExtracted"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node8", "type": "cleanupTempFiles"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node9", "type": "audioValidated"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "metadataCollected"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "reportInitialized"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "titlesAdded"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "metadataSaved"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "contentSaved"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "analysisSaved"}]}
